Title: Verify First Access Flow
Preconditions: User has never accessed the app before.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to access the app.
2. System checks if it's the first access.
3. System starts the application.
4. System checks if the user is already registered.
5. System proceeds to the home screen.
Expected Result: User is directed to the home screen after the application starts.

Title: Verify Non-First Access Flow
Preconditions: User has accessed the app before.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to access the app.
2. System checks if it's the first access.
3. System proceeds to the registration process.
4. System proceeds to the home screen.
Expected Result: User is directed to the registration process and then to the home screen.

Title: Verify Route Initiation and Emission Calculation
Preconditions: User is logged in and a route is initiated.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a route.
2. Application sends data to the server for calculation.
3. Server adds the route to the database.
4. Server retrieves the new route information.
5. Server returns emissions data to the application.
6. Application displays CO2 emissions to the user.
Expected Result: User receives CO2 emissions data for the newly initiated route.

Title: Verify Route Not In Progress
Preconditions: User is logged in but no route is in progress.
Test Steps:
1. User checks if a route is in progress.
2. System indicates no route is in progress.
3. User returns to the home screen.
Expected Result: User is directed to the home screen without initiating a route.

Title: Verify Weekly Report Visualization
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User views statistics.
2. System prompts to visualize a weekly report.
3. User chooses to visualize the report.
4. System displays the weekly report.
5. System asks if the user wants to change sections.
6. User chooses not to change sections.
7. System returns to the statistics view.
Expected Result: User sees the weekly report and remains in the statistics view.

Title: Verify No Weekly Report Visualization
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User views statistics.
2. System prompts to visualize a weekly report.
3. User chooses not to visualize the report.
4. System displays the horizontal menu.
5. System asks if the user wants to change sections.
6. User chooses not to change sections.
7. System returns to the statistics view.
Expected Result: User sees the horizontal menu and remains in the statistics view.

Title: Verify Profile View and Data Update
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User views their profile.
2. System displays personal data.
3. User decides to update their account.
4. User enters new data.
5. System updates the data.
6. System returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User's profile is updated successfully.

Title: Verify Profile Logout
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User views their profile.
2. System asks if the user wants to log out.
3. User decides to log out.
4. System logs the user out.
5. System returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User is logged out and returned to the profile view.

Title: Verify Profile Section Change
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User views their profile.
2. System asks if the user wants to change sections.
3. User decides to change sections.
4. System displays the horizontal menu.
5. User returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User sees the horizontal menu and returns to the profile view.

Title: Verify Successful Login
Preconditions: User has valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid credentials.
2. Application requests credentials.
3. Application sends credentials to the server.
4. Server verifies credentials with the database.
5. Server confirms credentials match.
6. Application informs the user that the login is successful.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully.

Title: Verify Failed Login
Preconditions: User has invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters invalid credentials.
2. Application requests credentials.
3. Application sends credentials to the server.
4. Server verifies credentials with the database.
5. Server confirms credentials do not match.
6. Application informs the user that the login failed.
Expected Result: User is informed that the login failed.

Title: Verify Empty Credentials
Preconditions: User leaves credentials fields empty.
Test Steps:
1. User leaves credentials fields empty.
2. Application requests credentials.
3. Application sends credentials to the server.
4. Server verifies credentials with the database.
5. Server confirms credentials are empty.
6. Application informs the user that the login failed due to empty fields.
Expected Result: User is informed that the login failed due to empty fields.

Title: Verify Route Not Found in Database
Preconditions: User has initiated a route but it is not found in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a route.
2. Application sends data to the server for calculation.
3. Server checks the database for the route.
4. Server confirms the route is not found.
5. Application informs the user that the route could not be calculated.
Expected Result: User is informed that the route could not be calculated.

Title: Verify No Data for Weekly Report
Preconditions: There is no data available for the weekly report.
Test Steps:
1. User views statistics.
2. System prompts to visualize a weekly report.
3. System confirms there is no data available.
4. System returns to the statistics view.
Expected Result: User is informed that there is no data available for the weekly report.

Title: Verify No Data for Profile Update
Preconditions: User has no data to update.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to update their account.
2. System confirms there is no data to update.
3. System returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User is informed that there is no data to update.

Title: Verify No Data for Section Change
Preconditions: User has no sections to change.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to change sections.
2. System confirms there are no sections to change.
3. System returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User is informed that there are no sections to change.

Title: Verify Route Calculation Error
Preconditions: Route calculation fails due to an error.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a route.
2. Application sends data to the server for calculation.
3. Server calculates the route.
4. Server encounters an error during calculation.
5. Application informs the user that the route could not be calculated.
Expected Result: User is informed that the route could not be calculated due to an error.

Title: Verify No Data for Horizontal Menu
Preconditions: There is no data available for the horizontal menu.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to change sections.
2. System confirms there is no data available for the horizontal menu.
3. System returns to the statistics view.
Expected Result: User is informed that there is no data available for the horizontal menu.

Title: Verify No Data for Profile Logout
Preconditions: User has no data to log out.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to log out.
2. System confirms there is no data to log out.
3. System returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User is informed that there is no data to log out.

Title: Verify Route Calculation Success
Preconditions: Route calculation succeeds.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a route.
2. Application sends data to the server for calculation.
3. Server calculates the route.
4. Server returns the route information.
5. Application displays the route information to the user.
Expected Result: User receives the route information successfully.

Preconditions: There is data available for the weekly report.
Test Steps:
1. User views statistics.
2. System prompts to visualize a weekly report.
3. System confirms there is data available.
4. System displays the weekly report.
5. System asks if the user wants to change sections.
6. User chooses not to change sections.
7. System returns to the statistics view.
Expected Result: User sees the weekly report and remains in the statistics view.

Title: Verify Data Available for Profile Update
Preconditions: User has data to update.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to update their account.
2. System confirms there is data to update.
3. System updates the data.
4. System returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User's profile is updated successfully.

Title: Verify Data Available for Section Change
Preconditions: User has sections to change.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to change sections.
2. System confirms there is data available for the horizontal menu.
3. System displays the horizontal menu.
4. User returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User sees the horizontal menu and returns to the profile view.

Title: Verify Route Calculation Success with Valid Data
Preconditions: Route calculation succeeds with valid data.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a route.
2. Application sends data to the server for calculation.
3. Server calculates the route.
4. Server returns the route information.
5. Application displays the route information to the user.
Expected Result: User receives the route information successfully.

Title: Verify Data Available for Horizontal Menu
Preconditions: There is data available for the horizontal menu.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to change sections.
2. System confirms there is data available for the horizontal menu.
3. System displays the horizontal menu.
4. User returns to the statistics view.
Expected Result: User sees the horizontal menu and returns to the statistics view.

Title: Verify Data Available for Profile Logout
Preconditions: User has data to log out.
Test Steps:
1. User decides to log out.
2. System confirms there is data to log out.
3. System logs the user out.
4. System returns to the profile view.
Expected Result: User is logged out and returned to the profile view.
